title_cn: 自 IPO 以来，Forgent 及其支持者在价格翻倍后提供股票

title_cn: 伯纳姆希望英国减少集权
summary: Many think Westminster is not working for most people. His answer? A new politics of devolving power down.

title: US and Iran Again Set for Talks After Halting Latest Round of Attacks
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在停止最新一轮袭击后再次举行会谈
summary: Get Caught Up.

title: Fossil Fuel Subsidies to Hit $1 Trillion in War’s Energy Price Shock, UN Says
title_cn: 联合国表示，在战争能源价格冲击中，化石燃料补贴将达到 1 万亿美元
summary: Fossil fuel subsidies are projected to reach $1.1 trillion in 2026 as governments spend more to shield consumers from high energy prices triggered by the war in Iran.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance TV: June 29th, 2026 (Podcast)
title_cn: 彭博监控电视：2026 年 6 月 29 日（播客）
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Supreme Court Rejects Trump Appeal of Carroll Abuse Verdict
title_cn: 最高法院驳回特朗普对卡罗尔虐待判决的上诉
summary: The US Supreme Court left intact a jury’s finding that Donald Trump sexually abused and defamed the writer E. Jean Carroll, putting her in line to collect a $5 million award from the president.

title: Oil Holds Gain as Iran Seeks Hormuz Control Before Talks With US
title_cn: 伊朗在与美国谈判之前寻求霍尔木兹控制权，油价保持上涨
summary: Oil held an advance before expected US-Iran talks in Doha, as conflicting signals from Washington and Tehran cast doubt over the next phase of negotiations to end the four-month war.

title: Raizen Keeps Burning Cash, Sets Steeper Charge Amid Restructure
title_cn: Raizen继续烧钱，在重组过程中设定更高的费用
summary: Brazilian sugar and fuels company Raizen SA reported a cash burn of 3.4 billion reais ($657 million) for the first three months of 2026 and roughly doubled its impairment charge for the crop year, signaling continued challenges as it proceeds with its debt restructuring plan.

title: Japan Stocks Set to Climb as Yen Hits 40-Year Low: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 日元跌至 40 年来新低，日本股市将上涨：市场结束
summary: Japanese stocks were set to rise as the yen slid to a four-decade low against the dollar and a rebound in several US technology giants lifted Wall Street.

title: Pakistan Says Strikes Kill 29 Afghans in New Border Flare Up
title_cn: 巴基斯坦称空袭导致29名阿富汗人在新边境冲​​突中丧生
summary: Pakistan said it carried out a ground operation and air strikes along its border with Afghanistan on Sunday and Monday, killing 29 militants in response to earlier attacks and marking the biggest flare-up in cross-border violence in weeks.

title: CEO Behind Knicks Flyfish Club Afterparty on What’s Next
title_cn: 尼克斯飞鱼俱乐部首席执行官在余兴派对上谈论下一步
summary: David Rodolitz, Founder and CEO of VCR Group, joined the live broadcast to discuss the recent celebration held by the New York Knicks at the Flyfish Club following their NBA Finals victory. As the owner of the Flyfish Club, Rodolitz shared insights on the significance of hosting such a high-profile event, emphasizing the value of the extensive press coverage generated. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Grasshopper Club Zurich Sold by LA Team to Bridge Football
title_cn: 苏黎世草蜢俱乐部被洛杉矶队出售给桥梁足球
summary: Bridge Football Group has bought Grasshopper Club Zurich, one of Switzerland’s most storied football teams.

title: Honeywell Aerospace CEO on Separation, Defense Demand
title_cn: 霍尼韦尔航空航天公司首席执行官谈分离和国防需求
summary: On the first day of trading following its spin-off from Honeywell International, Honeywell Aerospace CEO Jim Currier discussed the company's new status as a standalone aerospace and defense firm. Currier emphasized the company's embedded role within the aerospace and defense ecosystem, highlighting its mission-critical products and services across major commercial and defense platforms. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Comcast Plans to Spin Off NBCUniversal in Strategy Reversal
title_cn: 康卡斯特计划战略逆转，剥离 NBCUniversal
summary: Comcast Corp. plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky, unwinding a strategy that began more than a decade ago after struggling to demonstrate that a cable and media conglomerate would benefit shareholders.

title: Takaichi Aims to Shape Legacy With Unprecedented Economic Plan
title_cn: 高市旨在通过前所未有的经济计划塑造遗产
summary: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is staking her legacy as Japan’s first female premier on an unprecedented plan to reshape the country’s industrial base for decades to come.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: 円が40年ぶり安値、米イラン協議、FRBの独立性、ウォール街沸く、ビットコインETFから資金流出

title: Novelist Teddy Wayne Explores Themes of Power and Marriage Dynamics in 'The Au Pair'
title_cn: 小说家泰迪·韦恩在《互惠生》中探索权力和婚姻动态的主题
summary: Teddy Wayne, author of new novel 'The Au Pair,' said that he wanted to explore marriage dynamics and the way that his male main character reacts to his lack of success and feelings of emasculation as his wife becomes the breadwinner in their family.  Wayne, who originally intended the book as short, adaptable screenplay, also discussed the literary landscape and his writing process.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Supreme Court Contradicted Itself
title_cn: 最高法院自相矛盾
summary: The Supreme Court has issued two opinions that affect the independence of the US Federal Reserve, creating an extremely high-risk strategy, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist and Harvard Law professor Noah Feldman. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Struggles to Find Demand for Oil Driller’s 15% Loan
title_cn: 摩根大通努力寻找石油钻探 15% 贷款的需求
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has struggled to attract investor demand for a $775 million loan to a Trump administration-supported oil driller that would pay a hefty 15% interest rate, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Gold Drops as Traders Watch Iran Tensions for Inflation Outlook
title_cn: 交易员关注伊朗紧张局势和通胀前景，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell as the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other, following tit-for-tat strikes that tested a fragile truce in a war that has fueled global inflationary pressures.

title: Comcast to Spinoff NBCUniversal & Sky | Closing Bell
title_cn: 康卡斯特将分拆 NBCUniversal 和 Sky |结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nasdaq 100 Jumps More Than 2% as Dip Buyers Lift Tech Stocks
title_cn: 纳斯达克 100 指数上涨逾 2%，因逢低买家提振科技股
summary: Bargain hunters emerged to pick up beaten-down technology stocks on Monday, helping US stocks rally from last week’s declines.

title: Susquehanna Says It Lost Millions to Mystery Insider Traders
title_cn: 萨斯奎哈纳称其因神秘内幕交易者损失了数百万美元
summary: Susquehanna Investment Group is attempting to unmask the identities of individuals it claims made at least $100 million trading on inside information about a Chinese government crackdown on cross-border brokerages last month.

title: US Stocks Get Tech Boost After AI-Fueled Selloff: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 人工智能引发的抛售后，美国股市获得技术提振：市场结束
summary: A rally in several technology giants lifted stocks as the recent artificial-intelligence selloff lured buyers betting the industry’s investment boom will continue to support solid corporate earnings.

title: Strategy Says It May Sell Up to $1.25 Billion of Bitcoin
title_cn: Strategy表示可能会出售高达12.5亿美元的比特币
summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. unveiled a sweeping overhaul of the financing model underpinning its Bitcoin strategy, giving itself broader powers to sell the cryptocurrency, buy back securities and preserve liquidity as it adapts to mounting pressure on the structure that fueled years of aggressive accumulation.

title: Yen Hits 40-Year Low in Historic Slide That’s Rattled Japan
title_cn: 日元跌至 40 年来新低，令日本不安
summary: The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market.

title: Mexico Central Bank Adds Bond-Buying Tool to Back Liquidity
title_cn: 墨西哥央行增加债券购买工具以支持流动性
summary: Mexico’s central bank published regulations allowing it to buy some local government securities to support money-market liquidity when needed, expanding its toolkit to ensure the proper functioning of markets during selloffs or periods of high volatility.

title: Former Governors Teams Up to Address AI Job Losses
title_cn: 前州长联手解决人工智能失业问题
summary: Former Indiana Governor Eric Holcomb (R) says he is co-chairing an organization called RAISE US that is aimed at easing the American workforce’s transition to an artificial intelligence-based economy. Speaking to Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec on Bloomberg Businessweek, Holcomb explains that gaining support from big tech and leading AI companies like Amazon, Anthropic and Microsoft shows that shared commitment to preparing workers for AI-driven jobs.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BofA to Pay SEC $7.5 Million Over Reporting Lapse Allegations
title_cn: 美国银行因报告失误指控向 SEC 支付 750 万美元
summary: Bank of America Corp. agreed to pay $7.5 million to the Securities and Exchange Commission to settle allegations that its Merrill Lynch brokerage failed to properly file all required suspicious activity reports, according to a administrative action filed Monday.

title: JPMorgan Says Private Muni-Bond Accounts Swell to $1.6 Trillion
title_cn: 摩根大通称私人市政债券账户增至 1.6 万亿美元
summary: The business of overseeing individually tailored municipal-bond portfolios has continued to grow rapidly, turning those money managers into the biggest holders of state and local government debt, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.

title: Lagarde Says European Banking System More Resilient to Shocks
title_cn: 拉加德称欧洲银行体系更能抵御冲击
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde says Europe is becoming less vulnerable to outside shocks thanks to a better financial framework and progress on the green transition. She speaks during her institution’s annual retreat in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
title_cn: 在我们的 IQ 测试中测试您的 ETF 知识
summary: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Rises as US and Iran Halt Attacks, But Hormuz Traffic Slows
title_cn: 随着美国和伊朗停止袭击，油价上涨，但霍尔木兹交通放缓
summary: Oil rose as traders assessed upcoming peace talks between the US and Iran following a weekend of flare-ups over the Strait of Hormuz that served as a reminder of the fragility of their truce.

title: ETF IQ 6/29/2026
title_cn: ETF IQ 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Laffer Tengler CEO & CIO Nancy Tengler, Gabelli Funds President & Co-CIO of Value Chris Marangi, Founders ETFs Portfolio Manager Michael Monaghan, and Securitize VP & Head of Issuer Growth Giang Bui. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tokenization Diversifies Away from Crypto: Bui
title_cn: 代币化远离加密货币：Bui
summary: Giang Bui, VP and head of issuer growth at Securitize, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Raises Questions About Businesses’ Future
title_cn: 康卡斯特 (Comcast) 的 NBC 分拆引发了有关企业未来的疑问
summary: Brian Roberts lost out on an opportunity last year to merge NBCUniversal with Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. But the process helped get the chairman and co-chief executive officer of Comcast Corp. thinking about what NBCUniversal would look like on its own.

title: Exiled Chinese Tycoon Guo Gets 30 Years in US Prison for Fraud
title_cn: 流亡中国大亨郭因诈骗在美国被判入狱30年
summary: Exiled Chinese tycoon Miles Guo, who promoted himself as a crusader against the communist government in Beijing, was ordered to spend 30 years in a US prison for duping investors out of $1 billion.

title: LSEG CEO on AI Market Impact, Share Buybacks, Volatility
title_cn: 伦敦证券交易所集团首席执行官谈人工智能市场影响、股票回购和波动性
summary: David Schwimmer, CEO of the London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG), discussed the transformative impact of artificial intelligence on the financial markets. He emphasized that despite a challenging 2025 for shares, AI presents a significant opportunity for LSEG by enhancing the value of its proprietary data, which constitutes over 90% of its dataset. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean Financial Firms Fight for Share of AI Pay Bonanza
title_cn: 韩国金融公司争夺人工智能支付财富份额
summary: South Koreans are getting richer more quickly than anyone else in the world, creating an unprecedented opportunity for the country’s asset managers.

title: US Equities Poised for Best Quarterly Performance in Six Years
title_cn: 美国股市有望录得六年来最佳季度表现
summary: Meera Pandit, Executive Director of Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, joined the program to discuss the strong finish to the quarter for US equities. The segment highlighted that US stock markets are on track to deliver their best quarterly performance in six years, reflecting positive momentum and investor confidence as the quarter closes. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Says Warrant Needed for Phone Location Data
title_cn: 最高法院称手机位置数据需要搜查令
summary: The Supreme Court placed limits on a law enforcement investigative technique that leverages data on cell phone users’ location history to identify people near a crime scene.

title: Pimco Sees Fed on Hold for Rest of Year
title_cn: Pimco预计美联储今年剩余时间将按兵不动
summary: Pimco Head of Short-Term Portfolio Management Jerome Schneider expects the Federal Reserve to not move on interest rates for the rest of this year. He talks about how clients and investors can find growth amid hidden risks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Comcast Spinoff Will Be 'Value-Surfacing,' Marangi Says
title_cn: 马兰吉表示，康卡斯特的分拆将“体现价值”
summary: Chris Marangi, president and co-CIO of Gabelli Funds, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Comcast plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky, unwinding a strategy that began more than a decade ago after struggling to demonstrate that a cable and media conglomerate would benefit shareholders. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rocket Lab Targets SpaceX's Starlink Dominance in New Deal | Bloomberg Tech 6/29/2026
title_cn: 火箭实验室瞄准 SpaceX 在新政中的星链主导地位彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow speaks with the CEO of Rocket Lab about the company's biggest bet yet: buying Iridium in an $8 billion deal to challenge SpaceX in the orbital economy. Plus, South Korean firms, including Samsung and SK Hynix will spend at least $880 billion on chips and data centers, as the country seeks to maintain its edge in the AI era; and Anthropic wins US approval to restore some access to its Mythos 5 AI model after resolving concerns about the technology's potential threats to national security. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Super Micro Raided as Taiwan Expands Chip Smuggling Probe
title_cn: 台湾扩大芯片走私调查 超微遭突击搜查
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc.’s offices in Taiwan were raided by government authorities on Monday, widening an investigation into the alleged smuggling of Nvidia Corp. chips into China using the company’s servers, according to a person familiar with the situation. Super Micro’s shares fell as much as 9.2%.

title: Uber and Waymo Have Ended Their Robotaxi Tie-Up in Phoenix; Uber to Announce New Partner
title_cn: Uber 和 Waymo 结束了在凤凰城的 Robotaxi 合作；优步宣布新合作伙伴
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. said it has wound down its robotaxi offering with Alphabet Inc.’s Waymo in Phoenix, the latest relationship twist between two companies that simultaneously function as partners and competitors.

title: Comcast’s Big NBCUniversal Shakeup | Open Interest 6/29/2026
title_cn: 康卡斯特 (Comcast) 的 NBCUniversal 重组 |未平仓合约 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Comcast is shaking up media, with shares soaring on plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky. Tech rebounds as South Korea’s AI spending push lifts chip stocks. Plus, the US . and Iran agree to halt attacks ahead of Doha talks. Tyler Kendall breaks down the Supreme Court’s Fed independence ruling, and Del Monte Corporation CEO Mohammad Abu-Ghazaleh joins Open Interest on the brand’s reunion, supply chains, and pineapple-powered pharma research. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alibaba, Tencent Dropped by DC Lobbyists to Comply With US Curbs
title_cn: 阿里巴巴和腾讯被华盛顿游说者放弃，以遵守美国的限制措施
summary: Washington’s most powerful lobbying firms are rushing to cut ties with Chinese tech giants including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. as new US restrictions reshape the influence game for many Chinese companies.

title: Hugging Face CEO Weighs In on Anthropic AI Model's 'Dangerous' Label
title_cn: Hugging Face 首席执行官对人类人工智能模型的“危险”标签发表了看法
summary: As government scrutiny over Anthropic's Mythos AI model takes center stage in the public debate over AI's national security concerns, Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says being labeled "too dangerous" may actually be good marketing for frontier AI firms. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to explain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bob Iger, Joshua Kushner Discuss NBA Expansion Bid
title_cn: 鲍勃·艾格和约书亚·库什纳讨论 NBA 扩张计划
summary: Former Disney CEO Bob Iger and Thrive Capital founder Joshua Kushner have hired investment bankers and discussed making a bid for the National Basketball Association expansion team in Las Vegas, according to sources. Bloomberg's Natasha Mascarenhas joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic's Mythos 5 Gets US Approval for Wider Use
title_cn: Anthropic 的 Mythos 5 获得美国批准更广泛使用
summary: Anthropic won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 AI model, after resolving Trump administration concerns about the technology’s potential threats to national security. Theresa Payton, CEO of Fortalice Solutions and former White House CIO, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss how it shows the US is prioritizing national security while still enabling domestic AI adoption in critical sectors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MrBeast, Top YouTubers Sell Their Scraps at New Age Auction
title_cn: MrBeast 和顶级 YouTube 用户在 New Age 拍卖会上出售他们的碎片
summary: Bidders accustomed to buying prized art or luxury goods were recently introduced to a new category of coveted items at auction: Mementos from the world’s most popular internet stars.

title: Dual Perspectives on AI Investment Costs
title_cn: 人工智能投资成本的双重视角
summary: Momei Qu, managing director at PSP Growth, discusses two contrasting viewpoints surrounding AI investments: one emphasizing that the significant scale of investment indicates strong and genuine demand for AI technologies, and the other cautioning that the escalating costs of supporting AI infrastructure continue to rise, increasing the burden of proof for these investments. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WhatsApp Opens Username Reservations to 3 Billion Users
title_cn: WhatsApp 向 30 亿用户开放用户名预订
summary: WhatsApp will let the messaging service’s 3 billion global users select a username for their account, a change meant to increase privacy by letting people connect on the platform without having to share their phone number.

title: Verizon, BT Merge International Units in Home Markets Pivot
title_cn: Verizon 与 BT 合并国际业务 国内市场重心
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. and the UK’s BT Group Plc agreed to create a joint venture for their international businesses in a merger that will take the low-margin units off their books and allow the carriers to focus on their home markets.

title: World Bank, AfDB to Boost African Power Plan This Year
title_cn: 世界银行和非洲开发银行今年将推动非洲电力计划
summary: The World Bank and African Development Bank plan to accelerate their program to bring electricity to hundreds of millions of Africans this year by approving new projects, investing in Eritrea and promoting the development of regional power pools.

title: Ardian Plans to Invest Over €3 Billion in Nordic Data Centers
title_cn: Ardian 计划投资超过 30 亿欧元建设北欧数据中心
summary: Ardian SAS plans to invest over €3 billion ($3.4 billion) to build data centers in the Nordics, as lower energy prices and ample available land draw more digital infrastructure providers to the region.

title: Baidu’s CFO on the Company’s Approach to Recruiting Young Talent
title_cn: 百度首席财务官谈公司招募年轻人才的方法
summary:
In the China tech space, Baidu is now a full-stack player in the AI industry. As the maker of its own chips, AI model (Ernie), cloud system and a self-driving car business (Apollo Go), the tech giant is a very desirable company to work for.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Baidu CFO Henry He joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how the company uses AI to evolve its own organizational structure and attract new talent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Comcast Shares Surge on Plan to Spin Off NBCUniversal
title_cn: 康卡斯特股价因计划分拆 NBCUniversal 而飙升
summary: Comcast said it plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky into a new publicly traded company as it looks to separate its media businesses from its cable-TV and internet operations. Kelcee Griffis reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Relx Plans to Buy Back Up to £100 Million in Shares Next Month
title_cn: Relx 计划下个月回购高达 1 亿英镑的股票
summary: Relx Plc plans to repurchase shares valued at as much as £100 million ($132.1 million) next month, as the British information and analytics company continues to grapple with concerns that artificial intelligence tools will displace its core research products.

title: Amazon’s Rapid Delivery Push Triggers $15 Billion Rout for Eternal, Swiggy
title_cn: 亚马逊的快速配送推动 Eternal 和 Swiggy 损失 150 亿美元
summary: Eternal Ltd. and Swiggy Ltd. got the 10-minute delivery party going in India. Now, e-commerce titans Amazon.com Inc. and Walmart Inc.’s Flipkart are looking to crash it.

title: Millennium Builds AI Lab in Push for Cutting-Edge Products
title_cn: Millennium 建立人工智能实验室，推动尖端产品
summary: Millennium Management is setting up an artificial intelligence laboratory to expand the development and application of cutting-edge technologies at the firm.

title: The Uninvited Meeting Guest Is an AI Notetaker
title_cn: 不速之客是一位人工智能记笔记者
summary: AI bots are showing up to remote meetings faster than humans can create social norms to guide them.

title: Legal Panel Weighs Cook, Slaughter Rulings
title_cn: 法律小组对厨师、屠宰裁决进行权衡
summary: Natasha Sarin, Professor and Co-Founder of the Budget Lab at Yale University, and Jessica Roth, Professor at Cardozo Law School and a former federal prosecutor for the Southern District of New York, discuss the Supreme Court's rulings on President Trump's ability to fire agency heads and whether Lisa Cook can remain in her job at the Federal Reserve. They also weigh the economic and constitutional stakes of the pending birthright citizenship decision. They speak with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Machado Vows Return to Venezuela, Alleges Regime Blocked Her
title_cn: 马查多发誓返回委内瑞拉，声称政权阻止了她
summary: Venezuelan opposition leader María Corina Machado is planning an imminent return to her country, a move that would pose the biggest political challenge yet to acting President Delcy Rodríguez as she struggles to manage the country’s deadliest natural disaster in decades.

title: Fujimori Narrowly Wins Peru Vote on Her Fourth Bid
title_cn: 藤森在第四次申办中以微弱优势赢得秘鲁投票
summary: Conservative Keiko Fujimori won Peru’s presidential election by a slim margin in her fourth bid for the highest office in the copper-rich nation.

title: With Lisa Cook Ruling, Supreme Court Shields Fed From Trump
title_cn: 根据丽莎库克的裁决，最高法院保护美联储免受特朗普的影响
summary: The Supreme Court blocked Trump’s bid to remove the Fed’s Lisa Cook for now but expanded his power over other agencies. Hear what the rulings mean for the Fed’s future on the Big Take podcast. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Bets on Drones and AI in Contentious Defense Funding Plan
title_cn: 英国在有争议的国防资助计划中押注无人机和人工智能
summary: The UK will seek to transform its aging military into a force fit for modern warfare by investing in drones and artificial intelligence alongside more traditional deterrents such as fighter jets and nuclear weapons.

title: Supreme Court Ruling Fences Off Federal Reserve From Trump
title_cn: 最高法院裁定美联储不受特朗普影响
summary: Justices rule that Trump cannot fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook

title: Iran Ratchets Up Talk of Controlling Hormuz Ahead of New Talks
title_cn: 伊朗在新会谈之前加强控制霍尔木兹的讨论
summary: A top Iranian official reiterated the country’s determination to maintain control over maritime traffic moving through the Strait of Hormuz, raising the stakes ahead of fresh negotiations with the US on ending their war for good.

title: White House Looks to Tap Veteran Trump Advisers as Midterms Loom
title_cn: 随着中期选举的临近，白宫希望聘请特朗普的资深顾问
summary: The White House is temporarily bringing on two longtime advisers to President Donald Trump in an effort to bolster its messaging and operations ahead of midterm elections in which Republicans are facing the prospect of losing control of Congress.

title: Venezuela Quake Toll Hits 1,719, Government Sets Up Shelters
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数已达 1,719 人，政府设立避难所
summary: The death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela on June 24 rose to 1,719, National Assembly head Jorge Rodríguez announced Monday.

title: Supreme Court Expands Trump’s Power to Fire Top Regulators
title_cn: 最高法院扩大特朗普解雇最高监管机构的权力
summary: The Supreme Court has handed President Donald Trump sweeping power to bend much of the federal regulatory state to his will, a major expansion of executive branch influence that will enable him to fire the heads of independent agencies that police markets, protect consumers and enforce workplace rules.

title: Supreme Court Says Fed's Cook Can Stay in Role For Now | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/29/2026
title_cn: 最高法院称美联储库克暂时可以继续留任彭博商业周刊日报 6/29/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg's Mike McKee and June Grasso break down the Supreme Court's decision to allow Fed governor Lisa Cook to stay in her role while she fights President Trump's efforts to oust her. Then, former Governor of Indiana Eric Holcomb discusses RAISE US, a joint effort with former Rhode Island Governor Gina Raimondo that aims to develop a strategy around AI's impact on the labor market. Plus, Kikoff CEO Cynthia Chen, breaks down how her app helps consumers build credit and improve low credit scores. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Has Housing Bill in Limbo as Congress Sends It for Signing
title_cn: 特朗普的住房法案因国会送交签署而悬而未决
summary: President Donald Trump refused to commit to signing a major bipartisan housing bill, heightening uncertainty surrounding the fate of the legislation.

title: New CDC Leaders Vow to Boost Skeleton Staff Left After DOGE Cuts
title_cn: 新任疾控中心领导人誓言要增加 DOGE 裁员后留下的骨干人员
summary: New top leaders at the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention told staff they’re focused on hiring more people, including for senior roles, to alleviate pressure on the agency, according to a recording of a meeting reviewed by Bloomberg News.

title: US Treasury Opens Online Portal for Sanctions Removal Requests
title_cn: 美国财政部开放在线门户以受理取消制裁请求
summary: The US Treasury’s office in charge of sanctions launched an online portal for requests to be removed from blacklists or have penalties lifted.

title: Housing Bill Is So Unimportant Compared To Voter ID Says Trump (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普表示，住房法案与选民身份相比并不重要（问答）
summary: Trump spoke to reporter after signing an Executive Order on the right to repair autos in the Oval Office. He said he was surprised by the Supreme Court's ruling on mail-in ballots and that anything that's not the voter id bill is a 'yawn' to him.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cook Stays, Trump Gains Power | Balance of Power 6/29/2026
title_cn: 库克留任，特朗普掌权权力平衡 6/29/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses the latest developments from the Trump Administration. On today's show, former Acting White House Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Hicks Evaluation Group CEO Fredrick Hicks and Republican Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis of New York.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Tech Talent Is Turning Away from the US
title_cn: 为什么科技人才正在远离美国
summary: Skilled immigrants who obtained an education and built careers in the US are increasingly wondering whether, amid restrictive US policies, opportunities they sought in America can be had elsewhere. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South African Police on High Alert Before Anti-Migrant Protests
title_cn: 南非警方在反移民抗议前保持高度戒备
summary: South African police said they’re fully prepared for anti-migrant demonstrations that are planned across the nation on Tuesday and warned they would tolerate no intimidation or violence.

title: Supreme Court Says Mail Votes Can Arrive After Election Day
title_cn: 最高法院称邮寄选票可以在选举日后送达
summary: The US Supreme Court ruled that federal law permits mail-in ballots to arrive after Election Day in a decision that preserves grace periods in 30 states. Mick Mulvaney, Former-Acting WH Chief of Staff (Trump's First Term), Co-Founder of the Freedom Caucus, Former-OMB Director joins Balance of Power to discuss the latest news from the Supreme Court as well as the latest from Congress.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham’s UK Devolution Plan Lacks Answers on Financial Matters
title_cn: 伯纳姆的英国权力下放计划缺乏财务问题的答案
summary: Andy Burnham’s economic plan for Britain starts from the bottom up.

title: Burnham Vows to Shift Fiscal Powers From London
title_cn: 伯纳姆誓言将财政权力从伦敦转移
summary:
Andy Burnham pledged to radically devolve fiscal powers away from Westminster if he succeeds Keir Starmer as UK prime minister.

Lizzy Burden says his first speech since returning to parliament was "vibes-heavy and details-light." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cook Stays at Fed But Trump Wins Power Over Other Agencies
title_cn: 库克留在美联储，但特朗普赢得了对其他机构的权力
summary: A closely divided US Supreme Court reinforced the Federal Reserve’s independence from the White House, protecting governors from being fired by the president without proof of wrongdoing.

title: Trump Ends Carolina Wind Project as Cancellations Mount
title_cn: 随着取消数量的增加，特朗普结束了卡罗莱纳风电项目
summary: The Trump administration is canceling a lease held by Duke Energy Corp. off the coast of North Carolina as it expands its campaign to block new offshore wind developments.

title: Cook Ruling Marks the Latest Setback for Pulte’s Fraud Campaign
title_cn: 库克的裁决标志着普尔特欺诈活动的最新挫折
summary: The Supreme Court’s decision Monday to leave Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook in her job for now is a blow to the Trump administration’s monthslong crusade to fire her over alleged mortgage fraud.

title: France, Oman Back Free Transit Through Hormuz Without Conditions
title_cn: 法国和阿曼恢复无条件通过霍尔木兹海峡的自由过境
summary: France’s Emmanuel Macron and Oman’s Sultan Haitham bin Tariq said that they would promote restriction-free transit in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Congo Orders Cobalt Miners to Give Up Unused Export Quotas
title_cn: 刚果命令钴矿商放弃未使用的出口配额
summary: Cobalt miners in the Democratic Republic of Congo will be required to surrender unused export quotas for the first half of the year to a government regulator.

title: EU and China Agree on October Deadline to Reset Trade Relations
title_cn: 欧盟和中国就重启贸易关系十月期限达成一致
summary: The European Union and China set an October deadline to make progress on trade disagreements, as tensions rise between the two economic powers.

title: Lula Unveils New Aid for Workers as Brazil Election Nears
title_cn: 随着巴西大选临近，卢拉为工人提供新的援助
summary: Brazil’s government unveiled a new subsidized credit program for informal workers, targeting a key segment of the labor force ahead of President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva’s October reelection bid.
